title: Make Agentic SDLC a complete product-centered assessment experience
acceptance: Natural project-context and assessment requests activate a dedicated guided journey
A normal low-risk assessment has at most two understandable approval checkpoints
Requested Word Excel PDF and other output formats are canonical and enforced
The installed plugin completes the realistic assessment journey with automated evidence
